name: Goro Goro Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Goro Goro Shogi (5x6 shogi, a.k.a. Goro Goro Dobutsu Shogi): the full drop game on a 5x6 board with King, two Golds, two Silvers and three Pawns each -- no rook, bishop, knight or lance. Promotion zone is the far two ranks; only Silver and Pawn promote (to Gold).
